seoTitle: North Parramatta vs North Rocks — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Parramatta and North Rocks. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Parramatta vs North Rocks: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Parramatta and North Rocks.
heading: North Parramatta vs North Rocks — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Parramatta, New South Wales and North Rocks, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Rocks has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to North Parramatta (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Parramatta or North Rocks safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Parramatta has a flood risk score of 49/100, while North Rocks scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Parramatta scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. North Rocks scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Parramatta or North Rocks?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Rocks has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
